reasoning: Koren, our focus today is on improving lactate clearance and enhancing your aerobic base. Your last ride showed a relaxed effort, so today we will push into structured stress. Tackling Emigration Canyon with targeted over-unders will better prepare you for the main climb in the Alpine Loop where maintaining 220-235W for nearly an hour is key.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x [6 min @ 201-218W, 4 min @ 242-256W] with 2 min recovery at 174W

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
